message:
feat(fnp-python): native intersect1d via UFuncArray::intersect1d

Port np.intersect1d out of the passthrough pool for matched-dtype real
numeric inputs with assume_unique=false and return_indices=false. Falls
back to np.intersect1d when either kwarg is non-default (order-
preserving + tuple-return semantics stay with numpy) and for complex /
integer-sidecar / mixed-dtype inputs so numpy's dispatch surface stays
exact.

br-franken_numpy-hswb
